name: Texas Pita
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Whole corn, fresh or frozen
5 Whole wheat pita, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick pan over medium heat, sauté the vegetables (except corn) and spices for about 5 minutes.
2. Add the corn and cooked beans to the pan. Continue cooking until the beans and corn are hot.
3. Lay the pita on its side. Add a slice of tomato, half of the filling mixture, and lettuce. Serve hot.
